STm RANKL RNAseq Analysis

Updated by AJB Mar 18 2026

This is an R Markdown Notebook of AJB’s work with Clara’s RNAseq files to make PCA Plots and single-level contrasts between conditions.

Required Files For this Notebook

  • The mapped reads, stored as .bam files.
  • The reference genome, converted to .gtf format.

RNAseq Counts and Differential Expression

Begin by installing and loading packages. The RNAseq analysis uses the package Rsubread to generate mRNA counts for each gene. Then, this pipeline uses DESeq2 in order to determine differential expression of genes.

```r
# IF INSTALLATION IS NECESSARY
# if (!require(\BiocManager\, quietly = TRUE))
#     install.packages(\BiocManager\)
# BiocManager::install(\Rsubread\)
# BiocManager::install(\DESeq2\)
# BiocManager::install(\apeglm\)
# BiocManager::install(\biomaRt\)
# BiocManager::install(\PCAtools\)
# BiocManager::install(\ggforce\)

# Load Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(ggtext)
library(glue)
library(ggforce)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggrepel)
library(PCAtools)
library(Rsubread)
library(DESeq2)
library(ashr)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(biomaRt)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Access the aligned reads (SAM format) and run `Rsubread-featureCounts`
to determine how many RNA reads align to each gene.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

# Generate list of SAM files for featureCounts to use.
align_directory<-\C:/CassatLab/STm_RANKL_RNASeq/02_Mapping/aligned\
files<-list.files(path=align_directory, full.names=TRUE, pattern=\\\.bam$\)

# Run featureCounts on each file.
counts <- featureCounts(files=files,
                        isGTFAnnotationFile=TRUE,
                        annot.ext=\C:/CassatLab/STm_RANKL_RNASeq/GRCm39/Mus_musculus.GRCm39.113.gtf\,
                        GTF.featureType=\exon\,
                        GTF.attrType=\gene_id\,
                        isPairedEnd=TRUE,
                        genome=\C:/CassatLab/STm_RANKL_RNASeq/GRCm39/Mus_musculus.GRCm39.dna_rm.primary_assembly.fa\,
                        minFragLength=50,
                        nthreads=8,
                        )



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
# Generate list of SAM files for featureCounts to use.
align_directory<-\C:/CassatLab/STm_RANKL_RNASeq/02_Mapping/aligned\
files<-list.files(path=align_directory, full.names=TRUE, pattern=\\\.bam$\)

# Run featureCounts on each file.
counts <- featureCounts(files=files,
                        isGTFAnnotationFile=TRUE,
                        annot.ext=\C:/CassatLab/STm_RANKL_RNASeq/GRCm39/Mus_musculus.GRCm39.113.gtf\,
                        GTF.featureType=\exon\,
                        GTF.attrType=\gene_id\,
                        isPairedEnd=TRUE,
                        genome=\C:/CassatLab/STm_RANKL_RNASeq/GRCm39/Mus_musculus.GRCm39.dna_rm.primary_assembly.fa\,
                        minFragLength=50,
                        nthreads=8,
                        )
```
```

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Now save the featureCounts object to file. This .txt file will be a
matrix with each gene, and the number of assigned counts from each input
file.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

# Write the featureCounts object to a .txt file.
# The lapply function removes weird footers from gene names.
write.table(
  x=data.frame(counts$annotation[\GeneID\],
    counts$counts,
    stringsAsFactors=FALSE) %>%
    lapply(gsub, pattern='.t01', replacement='') %>%
    lapply(gsub, pattern='.r01', replacement=''),
  file=\counts_all.txt\,
  quote=FALSE,
  sep=\\t\,
  row.names=FALSE)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuIyBXcml0ZSB0aGUgZmVhdHVyZUNvdW50cyBvYmplY3QgdG8gYSAudHh0IGZpbGUuXG4jIFRoZSBsYXBwbHkgZnVuY3Rpb24gcmVtb3ZlcyB3ZWlyZCBmb290ZXJzIGZyb20gZ2VuZSBuYW1lcy5cbndyaXRlLnRhYmxlKFxuICB4PWRhdGEuZnJhbWUoY291bnRzJGFubm90YXRpb25bXFxHZW5lSURcXF0sXG4gICAgY291bnRzJGNvdW50cyxcbiAgICBzdHJpbmdzQXNGYWN0b3JzPUZBTFNFKSAlPiVcbiAgICBsYXBwbHkoZ3N1YiwgcGF0dGVybj0nLnQwMScsIHJlcGxhY2VtZW50PScnKSAlPiVcbiAgICBsYXBwbHkoZ3N1YiwgcGF0dGVybj0nLnIwMScsIHJlcGxhY2VtZW50PScnKSxcbiAgZmlsZT1cXGNvdW50c19hbGwudHh0XFwsXG4gIHF1b3RlPUZBTFNFLFxuICBzZXA9XFxcXHRcXCxcbiAgcm93Lm5hbWVzPUZBTFNFKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
# Write the featureCounts object to a .txt file.
# The lapply function removes weird footers from gene names.
write.table(
  x=data.frame(counts$annotation[\GeneID\],
    counts$counts,
    stringsAsFactors=FALSE) %>%
    lapply(gsub, pattern='.t01', replacement='') %>%
    lapply(gsub, pattern='.r01', replacement=''),
  file=\counts_all.txt\,
  quote=FALSE,
  sep=\\t\,
  row.names=FALSE)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Read in the counts matrix and load into DESeq2.
Split counts into 4h- and 24h- only files for PCA plotting.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

# Import counts file
cts <- as.matrix(read.table(\counts_all.txt\,sep=\\t\, header=TRUE))

# Import reference file for 4h timepoint.
coldata4h <- as.matrix(read.table(\seq_reference_4h.txt\, sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()
# Trim counts file to only 4h conditions
cts4h <- cts[,c(\GeneID\,coldata4h[,1])]

# Import reference file for 24h timepoint.
coldata24h <- as.matrix(read.table(\seq_reference_24h.txt\, sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()
# Trim counts file to only 24h conditions
cts24h <-cts[,c(\GeneID\,coldata24h[,1])]



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
# Import counts file
cts <- as.matrix(read.table(\counts_all.txt\,sep=\\t\, header=TRUE))

# Import reference file for 4h timepoint.
coldata4h <- as.matrix(read.table(\seq_reference_4h.txt\, sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()
# Trim counts file to only 4h conditions
cts4h <- cts[,c(\GeneID\,coldata4h[,1])]

# Import reference file for 24h timepoint.
coldata24h <- as.matrix(read.table(\seq_reference_24h.txt\, sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()
# Trim counts file to only 24h conditions
cts24h <-cts[,c(\GeneID\,coldata24h[,1])]
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


### Principal Component Analysis

#### 4-hour Timepoint


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

-->

# Get order of columns for counts matrix from column data
ctsColOrder <- coldata4h[,1]
# Append \GeneID\ column first
ctsColOrder <- c(\GeneID\,ctsColOrder)
# Re-order counts matrix 
cts4h <- cts4h[,ctsColOrder]

# Extract counts & Ignore first column (geneID) and first row (sample names)
countDataMatrix <- as.matrix(cts4h[-1,-1])
# Convert to integer
mode(countDataMatrix) <- \integer\
# Set rownames to geneIDs
rownames(countDataMatrix) <- cts4h[-1,1]
# Set colnames to sample names
colnames(countDataMatrix) <- colnames(cts4h)[-1]   

# Make DESeq dataset from the counts matrix
dds4h <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=countDataMatrix, 
                              colData=coldata4h,
                              design = ~condition)

# Filter rows with less than 10 reads.
smallestGroupSize <- 3
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds4h) >= 10) >= smallestGroupSize
dds4h <- dds4h[keep,]

# Run DESeq2 for each of the comparisons:
dds4h <- DESeq(dds4h)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuIyBHZXQgb3JkZXIgb2YgY29sdW1ucyBmb3IgY291bnRzIG1hdHJpeCBmcm9tIGNvbHVtbiBkYXRhXG5jdHNDb2xPcmRlciA8LSBjb2xkYXRhNGhbLDFdXG4jIEFwcGVuZCBcXEdlbmVJRFxcIGNvbHVtbiBmaXJzdFxuY3RzQ29sT3JkZXIgPC0gYyhcXEdlbmVJRFxcLGN0c0NvbE9yZGVyKVxuIyBSZS1vcmRlciBjb3VudHMgbWF0cml4IFxuY3RzNGggPC0gY3RzNGhbLGN0c0NvbE9yZGVyXVxuXG4jIEV4dHJhY3QgY291bnRzICYgSWdub3JlIGZpcnN0IGNvbHVtbiAoZ2VuZUlEKSBhbmQgZmlyc3Qgcm93IChzYW1wbGUgbmFtZXMpXG5jb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXggPC0gYXMubWF0cml4KGN0czRoWy0xLC0xXSlcbiMgQ29udmVydCB0byBpbnRlZ2VyXG5tb2RlKGNvdW50RGF0YU1hdHJpeCkgPC0gXFxpbnRlZ2VyXFxcbiMgU2V0IHJvd25hbWVzIHRvIGdlbmVJRHNcbnJvd25hbWVzKGNvdW50RGF0YU1hdHJpeCkgPC0gY3RzNGhbLTEsMV1cbiMgU2V0IGNvbG5hbWVzIHRvIHNhbXBsZSBuYW1lc1xuY29sbmFtZXMoY291bnREYXRhTWF0cml4KSA8LSBjb2xuYW1lcyhjdHM0aClbLTFdICAgXG5cbiMgTWFrZSBERVNlcSBkYXRhc2V0IGZyb20gdGhlIGNvdW50cyBtYXRyaXhcbmRkczRoIDwtIERFU2VxRGF0YVNldEZyb21NYXRyaXgoY291bnREYXRhPWNvdW50RGF0YU1hdHJpeCwgXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICBjb2xEYXRhPWNvbGRhdGE0aCxcbiAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgIGRlc2lnbiA9IH5jb25kaXRpb24pXG5cbiMgRmlsdGVyIHJvd3Mgd2l0aCBsZXNzIHRoYW4gMTAgcmVhZHMuXG5zbWFsbGVzdEdyb3VwU2l6ZSA8LSAzXG5rZWVwIDwtIHJvd1N1bXMoY291bnRzKGRkczRoKSA+PSAxMCkgPj0gc21hbGxlc3RHcm91cFNpemVcbmRkczRoIDwtIGRkczRoW2tlZXAsXVxuXG4jIFJ1biBERVNlcTIgZm9yIGVhY2ggb2YgdGhlIGNvbXBhcmlzb25zOlxuZGRzNGggPC0gREVTZXEoZGRzNGgpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
# Get order of columns for counts matrix from column data
ctsColOrder <- coldata4h[,1]
# Append \GeneID\ column first
ctsColOrder <- c(\GeneID\,ctsColOrder)
# Re-order counts matrix 
cts4h <- cts4h[,ctsColOrder]

# Extract counts & Ignore first column (geneID) and first row (sample names)
countDataMatrix <- as.matrix(cts4h[-1,-1])
# Convert to integer
mode(countDataMatrix) <- \integer\
# Set rownames to geneIDs
rownames(countDataMatrix) <- cts4h[-1,1]
# Set colnames to sample names
colnames(countDataMatrix) <- colnames(cts4h)[-1]   

# Make DESeq dataset from the counts matrix
dds4h <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=countDataMatrix, 
                              colData=coldata4h,
                              design = ~condition)

# Filter rows with less than 10 reads.
smallestGroupSize <- 3
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds4h) >= 10) >= smallestGroupSize
dds4h <- dds4h[keep,]

# Run DESeq2 for each of the comparisons:
dds4h <- DESeq(dds4h)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Using the R library PCAtools, perform PCA.

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVkbk4wSUR3dElHRnpjMkY1S0haemRDaGtaSE0wYUN4aWJHbHVaRDFHUVV4VFJTa3BYRzV3WTJFMGFDQThMU0J3WTJFb2RuTjBMQ0J0WlhSaFpHRjBZVDFqYjJ4RVlYUmhLR1JrY3pSb0tTbGNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxudnN0IDwtIGFzc2F5KHZzdChkZHM0aCxibGluZD1GQUxTRSkpXG5wY2E0aCA8LSBwY2EodnN0LCBtZXRhZGF0YT1jb2xEYXRhKGRkczRoKSlcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

vst <- assay(vst(dds4h,blind=FALSE))
pca4h <- pca(vst, metadata=colData(dds4h))



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dWRuTjBJRHd0SUdGemMyRjVLSFp6ZENoa1pITTBhQ3hpYkdsdVpEMUdRVXhUUlNrcFhHNXdZMkUwYUNBOExTQndZMkVvZG5OMExDQnRaWFJoWkdGMFlUMWpiMnhFWVhSaEtHUmtjelJvS1NsY2JtQmdZRnh1WUdCZ0luMD0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmBgYHJcbnZzdCA8LSBhc3NheSh2c3QoZGRzNGgsYmxpbmQ9RkFMU0UpKVxucGNhNGggPC0gcGNhKHZzdCwgbWV0YWRhdGE9Y29sRGF0YShkZHM0aCkpXG5gYGBcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudnN0IDwtIGFzc2F5KHZzdChkZHM0aCxibGluZD1GQUxTRSkpXG5wY2E0aCA8LSBwY2EodnN0LCBtZXRhZGF0YT1jb2xEYXRhKGRkczRoKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
vst <- assay(vst(dds4h,blind=FALSE))
pca4h <- pca(vst, metadata=colData(dds4h))
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

cHBlbmQgXFxHZW5lSURcXCBjb2x1bW4gZmlyc3RcbmN0c0NvbE9yZGVyIDwtIGMoXFxHZW5lSURcXCxjdHNDb2xPcmRlcilcbiMgUmUtb3JkZXIgY291bnRzIG1hdHJpeCBcbmN0czI0aCA8LSBjdHMyNGhbLGN0c0NvbE9yZGVyXVxuXG4jIEV4dHJhY3QgY291bnRzICYgSWdub3JlIGZpcnN0IGNvbHVtbiAoZ2VuZUlEKSBhbmQgZmlyc3Qgcm93IChzYW1wbGUgbmFtZXMpXG5jb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXggPC0gYXMubWF0cml4KGN0czI0aFstMSwtMV0pXG4jIENvbnZlcnQgdG8gaW50ZWdlclxubW9kZShjb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgpIDwtIFxcaW50ZWdlclxcXG4jIFNldCByb3duYW1lcyB0byBnZW5lSURzXG5yb3duYW1lcyhjb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgpIDwtIGN0czI0aFstMSwxXVxuIyBTZXQgY29sbmFtZXMgdG8gc2FtcGxlIG5hbWVzXG5jb2xuYW1lcyhjb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgpIDwtIGNvbG5hbWVzKGN0czI0aClbLTFdICAgXG5cbiMgTWFrZSBERVNlcSBkYXRhc2V0IGZyb20gdGhlIGNvdW50cyBtYXRyaXhcbmRkczI0aCA8LSBERVNlcURhdGFTZXRGcm9tTWF0cml4KGNvdW50RGF0YT1jb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgsIFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgY29sRGF0YT1jb2xkYXRhMjRoLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgZGVzaWduID0gfmNvbmRpdGlvbilcblxuIyBGaWx0ZXIgcm93cyB3aXRoIGxlc3MgdGhhbiAxMCByZWFkcy5cbnNtYWxsZXN0R3JvdXBTaXplIDwtIDNcbmtlZXAgPC0gcm93U3Vtcyhjb3VudHMoZGRzMjRoKSA+PSAxMCkgPj0gc21hbGxlc3RHcm91cFNpemVcbmRkczI0aCA8LSBkZHMyNGhba2VlcCxdXG5cbiMgUnVuIERFU2VxMiBmb3IgZWFjaCBvZiB0aGUgY29tcGFyaXNvbnM6XG5kZHMyNGggPC0gREVTZXEoZGRzMjRoKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

# Get order of columns for counts matrix from column data
ctsColOrder <- coldata24h[,1]
# Append \GeneID\ column first
ctsColOrder <- c(\GeneID\,ctsColOrder)
# Re-order counts matrix 
cts24h <- cts24h[,ctsColOrder]

# Extract counts & Ignore first column (geneID) and first row (sample names)
countDataMatrix <- as.matrix(cts24h[-1,-1])
# Convert to integer
mode(countDataMatrix) <- \integer\
# Set rownames to geneIDs
rownames(countDataMatrix) <- cts24h[-1,1]
# Set colnames to sample names
colnames(countDataMatrix) <- colnames(cts24h)[-1]   

# Make DESeq dataset from the counts matrix
dds24h <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=countDataMatrix, 
                              colData=coldata24h,
                              design = ~condition)

# Filter rows with less than 10 reads.
smallestGroupSize <- 3
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds24h) >= 10) >= smallestGroupSize
dds24h <- dds24h[keep,]

# Run DESeq2 for each of the comparisons:
dds24h <- DESeq(dds24h)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuIyBHZXQgb3JkZXIgb2YgY29sdW1ucyBmb3IgY291bnRzIG1hdHJpeCBmcm9tIGNvbHVtbiBkYXRhXG5jdHNDb2xPcmRlciA8LSBjb2xkYXRhMjRoWywxXVxuIyBBcHBlbmQgXFxHZW5lSURcXCBjb2x1bW4gZmlyc3RcbmN0c0NvbE9yZGVyIDwtIGMoXFxHZW5lSURcXCxjdHNDb2xPcmRlcilcbiMgUmUtb3JkZXIgY291bnRzIG1hdHJpeCBcbmN0czI0aCA8LSBjdHMyNGhbLGN0c0NvbE9yZGVyXVxuXG4jIEV4dHJhY3QgY291bnRzICYgSWdub3JlIGZpcnN0IGNvbHVtbiAoZ2VuZUlEKSBhbmQgZmlyc3Qgcm93IChzYW1wbGUgbmFtZXMpXG5jb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXggPC0gYXMubWF0cml4KGN0czI0aFstMSwtMV0pXG4jIENvbnZlcnQgdG8gaW50ZWdlclxubW9kZShjb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgpIDwtIFxcaW50ZWdlclxcXG4jIFNldCByb3duYW1lcyB0byBnZW5lSURzXG5yb3duYW1lcyhjb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgpIDwtIGN0czI0aFstMSwxXVxuIyBTZXQgY29sbmFtZXMgdG8gc2FtcGxlIG5hbWVzXG5jb2xuYW1lcyhjb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgpIDwtIGNvbG5hbWVzKGN0czI0aClbLTFdICAgXG5cbiMgTWFrZSBERVNlcSBkYXRhc2V0IGZyb20gdGhlIGNvdW50cyBtYXRyaXhcbmRkczI0aCA8LSBERVNlcURhdGFTZXRGcm9tTWF0cml4KGNvdW50RGF0YT1jb3VudERhdGFNYXRyaXgsIFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgY29sRGF0YT1jb2xkYXRhMjRoLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgZGVzaWduID0gfmNvbmRpdGlvbilcblxuIyBGaWx0ZXIgcm93cyB3aXRoIGxlc3MgdGhhbiAxMCByZWFkcy5cbnNtYWxsZXN0R3JvdXBTaXplIDwtIDNcbmtlZXAgPC0gcm93U3Vtcyhjb3VudHMoZGRzMjRoKSA+PSAxMCkgPj0gc21hbGxlc3RHcm91cFNpemVcbmRkczI0aCA8LSBkZHMyNGhba2VlcCxdXG5cbiMgUnVuIERFU2VxMiBmb3IgZWFjaCBvZiB0aGUgY29tcGFyaXNvbnM6XG5kZHMyNGggPC0gREVTZXEoZGRzMjRoKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
# Get order of columns for counts matrix from column data
ctsColOrder <- coldata24h[,1]
# Append \GeneID\ column first
ctsColOrder <- c(\GeneID\,ctsColOrder)
# Re-order counts matrix 
cts24h <- cts24h[,ctsColOrder]

# Extract counts & Ignore first column (geneID) and first row (sample names)
countDataMatrix <- as.matrix(cts24h[-1,-1])
# Convert to integer
mode(countDataMatrix) <- \integer\
# Set rownames to geneIDs
rownames(countDataMatrix) <- cts24h[-1,1]
# Set colnames to sample names
colnames(countDataMatrix) <- colnames(cts24h)[-1]   

# Make DESeq dataset from the counts matrix
dds24h <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=countDataMatrix, 
                              colData=coldata24h,
                              design = ~condition)

# Filter rows with less than 10 reads.
smallestGroupSize <- 3
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds24h) >= 10) >= smallestGroupSize
dds24h <- dds24h[keep,]

# Run DESeq2 for each of the comparisons:
dds24h <- DESeq(dds24h)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Using the R library PCAtools, perform PCA.

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVkbk4wSUR3dElHRnpjMkY1S0haemRDaGtaSE15Tkdnc1lteHBibVE5UmtGTVUwVXBLVnh1Y0dOaE1qUm9JRHd0SUhCallTaDJjM1FzSUcxbGRHRmtZWFJoUFdOdmJFUmhkR0VvWkdSek1qUm9LU2xjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbnZzdCA8LSBhc3NheSh2c3QoZGRzMjRoLGJsaW5kPUZBTFNFKSlcbnBjYTI0aCA8LSBwY2EodnN0LCBtZXRhZGF0YT1jb2xEYXRhKGRkczI0aCkpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

vst <- assay(vst(dds24h,blind=FALSE))
pca24h <- pca(vst, metadata=colData(dds24h))



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dWRuTjBJRHd0SUdGemMyRjVLSFp6ZENoa1pITXlOR2dzWW14cGJtUTlSa0ZNVTBVcEtWeHVjR05oTWpSb0lEd3RJSEJqWVNoMmMzUXNJRzFsZEdGa1lYUmhQV052YkVSaGRHRW9aR1J6TWpSb0tTbGNibUJnWUZ4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5gYGByXG52c3QgPC0gYXNzYXkodnN0KGRkczI0aCxibGluZD1GQUxTRSkpXG5wY2EyNGggPC0gcGNhKHZzdCwgbWV0YWRhdGE9Y29sRGF0YShkZHMyNGgpKVxuYGBgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudnN0IDwtIGFzc2F5KHZzdChkZHMyNGgsYmxpbmQ9RkFMU0UpKVxucGNhMjRoIDwtIHBjYSh2c3QsIG1ldGFkYXRhPWNvbERhdGEoZGRzMjRoKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
vst <- assay(vst(dds24h,blind=FALSE))
pca24h <- pca(vst, metadata=colData(dds24h))
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


24h PCA Plot


<!-- rnb-text-end -->

-->

# Create dataframe with rotation information (i.e. the PC1/2/3 data to plot)
pcaPlotData <- pca24h$rotated

# Get percent information
percentVar <- round(pca24h$variance,2)

# Make PCA Plot with ggplot2
plot <- ggplot()+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0,
             linetype=\dashed\,
             linewidth=0.5) + 
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,
             linetype=\dashed\,
             linewidth=0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(x=pcaPlotData$PC1,
                 y=pcaPlotData$PC2,
                 fill=pca24h$metadata$condition),
             size=3, alpha=.8, shape=21,) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = \Condition\,
                    values = c(`24h_mock_0`=\#FFCC34\,`24h_mock_100`=\#F3271F\,
                               `24h_STm_0`=\#0577C1\,`24h_STm_100`=\#6E1077\),
                    breaks = c(\24h_mock_0\, \24h_mock_100\,
                               \24h_STm_0\, \24h_STm_100\),
                    labels = c(\Mock-0R\, \Mock-100R\,
                               glue(\<i>S</i>Tm-0R\), 
                               glue(\<i>S</i>Tm-100R\))) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-55,55)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-45,30)) +
  labs(title=\PCA Plot - 24h\,
       fill=\Condition\) +
  xlab(paste0(\PC1: \,percentVar[1],\% variance\)) +
  ylab(paste0(\PC2: \,percentVar[2],\% variance\)) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='right',
        legend.title=element_text(face=\bold\, size=11),
        legend.text=element_markdown(color = \black\, size = 11))

# Show plot
plot
ggsave(\24hPCA_Final.png\, width=6, height=4)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
# Create dataframe with rotation information (i.e. the PC1/2/3 data to plot)
pcaPlotData <- pca24h$rotated

# Get percent information
percentVar <- round(pca24h$variance,2)

# Make PCA Plot with ggplot2
plot <- ggplot()+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0,
             linetype=\dashed\,
             linewidth=0.5) + 
  geom_vline(xintercept=0,
             linetype=\dashed\,
             linewidth=0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(x=pcaPlotData$PC1,
                 y=pcaPlotData$PC2,
                 fill=pca24h$metadata$condition),
             size=3, alpha=.8, shape=21,) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = \Condition\,
                    values = c(`24h_mock_0`=\#FFCC34\,`24h_mock_100`=\#F3271F\,
                               `24h_STm_0`=\#0577C1\,`24h_STm_100`=\#6E1077\),
                    breaks = c(\24h_mock_0\, \24h_mock_100\,
                               \24h_STm_0\, \24h_STm_100\),
                    labels = c(\Mock-0R\, \Mock-100R\,
                               glue(\<i>S</i>Tm-0R\), 
                               glue(\<i>S</i>Tm-100R\))) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-55,55)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-45,30)) +
  labs(title=\PCA Plot - 24h\,
       fill=\Condition\) +
  xlab(paste0(\PC1: \,percentVar[1],\% variance\)) +
  ylab(paste0(\PC2: \,percentVar[2],\% variance\)) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='right',
        legend.title=element_text(face=\bold\, size=11),
        legend.text=element_markdown(color = \black\, size = 11))

# Show plot
plot
ggsave(\24hPCA_Final.png\, width=6, height=4)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

-->

# Import counts file
cts <- as.matrix(read.table(\counts_all.txt\,sep=\\t\, header=TRUE))

# Import column data, saved as tab-delimited .txt, and remove spaces that head some values
coldata <- as.matrix(read.table(\seq_reference_full.txt\, sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()

# Get order of columns for counts matrix from column data
ctsColOrder <- coldata[,1]
# Append \GeneID\ column first
ctsColOrder <- c(\GeneID\,ctsColOrder)
# Re-order counts matrix 
cts <- cts[,ctsColOrder]

# Extract counts & Ignore first column (geneID) and first row (sample names)
countDataMatrix <- as.matrix(cts[-1,-1])
# Convert to integer
mode(countDataMatrix) <- \integer\
# Set rownames to geneIDs
rownames(countDataMatrix) <- cts[-1,1]
# Set colnames to sample names
colnames(countDataMatrix) <- colnames(cts)[-1]   

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=countDataMatrix, 
                              colData=coldata,
                              design = ~condition)

# Run DESeq2 for each of the comparisons:
dds <- DESeq(dds)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
# Import counts file
cts <- as.matrix(read.table(\counts_all.txt\,sep=\\t\, header=TRUE))

# Import column data, saved as tab-delimited .txt, and remove spaces that head some values
coldata <- as.matrix(read.table(\seq_reference_full.txt\, sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()

# Get order of columns for counts matrix from column data
ctsColOrder <- coldata[,1]
# Append \GeneID\ column first
ctsColOrder <- c(\GeneID\,ctsColOrder)
# Re-order counts matrix 
cts <- cts[,ctsColOrder]

# Extract counts & Ignore first column (geneID) and first row (sample names)
countDataMatrix <- as.matrix(cts[-1,-1])
# Convert to integer
mode(countDataMatrix) <- \integer\
# Set rownames to geneIDs
rownames(countDataMatrix) <- cts[-1,1]
# Set colnames to sample names
colnames(countDataMatrix) <- colnames(cts)[-1]   

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=countDataMatrix, 
                              colData=coldata,
                              design = ~condition)

# Run DESeq2 for each of the comparisons:
dds <- DESeq(dds)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Now we use a log fold change (LFC) shrinkage correction to improve gene
ranks. This was published in [*Bioinformatics* in
2018.](https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/bty895)


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVJeUJWYzJVZ2RHaGxJRXhHUXlCaFpHcDFjM1J0Wlc1MElHWnZjaUJsWVdOb0lHZHliM1Z3TGx4dVpHUnpURVpESUR3dElHeG1ZMU5vY21sdWF5aGtaSE1zSUdOdmJuUnlZWE4wUFdNb1hDSmpiMjVrYVhScGIyNWNJaXdnWENJMGFGOVRWRzFmTVRBd1hDSXNJRndpTkdoZlUxUnRYekJjSWlrc0lIUjVjR1U5WENKaGMyaHlYQ0lwWEc1Z1lHQWlmUT09IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG4jIFVzZSB0aGUgTEZDIGFkanVzdG1lbnQgZm9yIGVhY2ggZ3JvdXAuXG5kZHNMRkMgPC0gbGZjU2hyaW5rKGRkcywgY29udHJhc3Q9YyhcXGNvbmRpdGlvblxcLCBcXDRoX1NUbV8xMDBcXCwgXFw0aF9TVG1fMFxcKSwgdHlwZT1cXGFzaHJcXClcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

# Use the LFC adjustment for each group.
ddsLFC <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast=c(\condition\, \4h_STm_100\, \4h_STm_0\), type=\ashr\)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dUl5QlZjMlVnZEdobElFeEdReUJoWkdwMWMzUnRaVzUwSUdadmNpQmxZV05vSUdkeWIzVndMbHh1WkdSelRFWkRJRHd0SUd4bVkxTm9jbWx1YXloa1pITXNJR052Ym5SeVlYTjBQV01vWEZ4amIyNWthWFJwYjI1Y1hDd2dYRncwYUY5VFZHMWZNVEF3WEZ3c0lGeGNOR2hmVTFSdFh6QmNYQ2tzSUhSNWNHVTlYRnhoYzJoeVhGd3BYRzVnWUdCY2JtQmdZQ0o5IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5gYGByXG4jIFVzZSB0aGUgTEZDIGFkanVzdG1lbnQgZm9yIGVhY2ggZ3JvdXAuXG5kZHNMRkMgPC0gbGZjU2hyaW5rKGRkcywgY29udHJhc3Q9YyhcXGNvbmRpdGlvblxcLCBcXDRoX1NUbV8xMDBcXCwgXFw0aF9TVG1fMFxcKSwgdHlwZT1cXGFzaHJcXClcbmBgYFxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuIyBVc2UgdGhlIExGQyBhZGp1c3RtZW50IGZvciBlYWNoIGdyb3VwLlxuZGRzTEZDIDwtIGxmY1NocmluayhkZHMsIGNvbnRyYXN0PWMoXFxjb25kaXRpb25cXCwgXFw0aF9TVG1fMTAwXFwsIFxcNGhfU1RtXzBcXCksIHR5cGU9XFxhc2hyXFwpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
# Use the LFC adjustment for each group.
ddsLFC <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast=c(\condition\, \4h_STm_100\, \4h_STm_0\), type=\ashr\)
```
```

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Check the available comparisons relative to a group, in this case the
mock-infected non-RANKL-treated group at 4h.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjM1Z0YldGeWVTaGtaSE5NUmtNcFhHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuc3VtbWFyeShkZHNMRkMpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

summary(ddsLFC)

```r
```r
summary(ddsLFC)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Import Ensembl Database
We will use the package biomaRt to reference the Ensembl database and
relates the Ensembl gene id (i.e. "ENSMUSG00000064336") to a more
understandable gene name. We will merge this reference with the output
folder to facilitate plotting.

This first block checks biomaRt for all possible attributes available in
the *Mus musculus* database.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVaM0pqYlRNNUlEMGdkWE5sUlc1elpXMWliQ2hpYVc5dFlYSjBQU2RsYm5ObGJXSnNKeXdnWkdGMFlYTmxkRDFjSW0xdGRYTmpkV3gxYzE5blpXNWxYMlZ1YzJWdFlteGNJaWxjYmx4dVlYUjBjbWxpZFhSbFRHbHpkQ0E4TFNCc2FYTjBRWFIwY21saWRYUmxjeWhuY21OdE16a3BYRzVnWUdBaWZRPT0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmdyY20zOSA9IHVzZUVuc2VtYmwoYmlvbWFydD0nZW5zZW1ibCcsIGRhdGFzZXQ9XFxtbXVzY3VsdXNfZ2VuZV9lbnNlbWJsXFwpXG5cbmF0dHJpYnV0ZUxpc3QgPC0gbGlzdEF0dHJpYnV0ZXMoZ3JjbTM5KVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

grcm39 = useEnsembl(biomart='ensembl', dataset=\mmusculus_gene_ensembl\)

attributeList <- listAttributes(grcm39)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dVozSmpiVE01SUQwZ2RYTmxSVzV6WlcxaWJDaGlhVzl0WVhKMFBTZGxibk5sYldKc0p5d2daR0YwWVhObGREMWNYRzF0ZFhOamRXeDFjMTluWlc1bFgyVnVjMlZ0WW14Y1hDbGNibHh1WVhSMGNtbGlkWFJsVEdsemRDQThMU0JzYVhOMFFYUjBjbWxpZFhSbGN5aG5jbU50TXprcFhHNWdZR0JjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmBgYHJcbmdyY20zOSA9IHVzZUVuc2VtYmwoYmlvbWFydD0nZW5zZW1ibCcsIGRhdGFzZXQ9XFxtbXVzY3VsdXNfZ2VuZV9lbnNlbWJsXFwpXG5cbmF0dHJpYnV0ZUxpc3QgPC0gbGlzdEF0dHJpYnV0ZXMoZ3JjbTM5KVxuYGBgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZ3JjbTM5ID0gdXNlRW5zZW1ibChiaW9tYXJ0PSdlbnNlbWJsJywgZGF0YXNldD1cXG1tdXNjdWx1c19nZW5lX2Vuc2VtYmxcXClcblxuYXR0cmlidXRlTGlzdCA8LSBsaXN0QXR0cmlidXRlcyhncmNtMzkpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
grcm39 = useEnsembl(biomart='ensembl', dataset=\mmusculus_gene_ensembl\)

attributeList <- listAttributes(grcm39)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Now we will make the reference table with: - Ensembl Gene Name - Gene
Type (i.e. coding, lncRNA, etc) - Gene Name (i.e. "sox9") - Chromosome -
Start Position - Stop Position

It will be saved as "grcm39_ref.txt" for future uses and so we don't
need to access biomaRt the whole time.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZV3hzWDJkbGJtVnpJRHd0SUdkbGRFSk5LR0YwZEhKcFluVjBaWE05WXlnblpXNXpaVzFpYkY5blpXNWxYMmxrSnl3bloyVnVaVjlpYVc5MGVYQmxKeXduWlhoMFpYSnVZV3hmWjJWdVpWOXVZVzFsSnl3Z0oyVnVkSEpsZW1kbGJtVmZhV1FuTENkamFISnZiVzl6YjIxbFgyNWhiV1VuTENkemRHRnlkRjl3YjNOcGRHbHZiaWNzSjJWdVpGOXdiM05wZEdsdmJpY3BMQ0J0WVhKMElEMGdaM0pqYlRNNUtWeHVYRzUzY21sMFpTNTBZV0pzWlNoaGJHeGZaMlZ1WlhNc0lHWnBiR1U5WENKbmNtTnRNemxmY21WbUxuUjRkRndpTEZ4dUlDQnhkVzkwWlQxR1FVeFRSU3hjYmlBZ2MyVndQVndpWEZ4MFhDSXNYRzRnSUhKdmR5NXVZVzFsY3oxR1FVeFRSU2xjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmFsbF9nZW5lcyA8LSBnZXRCTShhdHRyaWJ1dGVzPWMoJ2Vuc2VtYmxfZ2VuZV9pZCcsJ2dlbmVfYmlvdHlwZScsJ2V4dGVybmFsX2dlbmVfbmFtZScsICdlbnRyZXpnZW5lX2lkJywnY2hyb21vc29tZV9uYW1lJywnc3RhcnRfcG9zaXRpb24nLCdlbmRfcG9zaXRpb24nKSwgbWFydCA9IGdyY20zOSlcblxud3JpdGUudGFibGUoYWxsX2dlbmVzLCBmaWxlPVxcZ3JjbTM5X3JlZi50eHRcXCxcbiAgcXVvdGU9RkFMU0UsXG4gIHNlcD1cXFxcdFxcLFxuICByb3cubmFtZXM9RkFMU0UpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

all_genes <- getBM(attributes=c('ensembl_gene_id','gene_biotype','external_gene_name', 'entrezgene_id','chromosome_name','start_position','end_position'), mart = grcm39)

write.table(all_genes, file=\grcm39_ref.txt\,
  quote=FALSE,
  sep=\\t\,
  row.names=FALSE)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dVlXeHNYMmRsYm1WeklEd3RJR2RsZEVKTktHRjBkSEpwWW5WMFpYTTlZeWduWlc1elpXMWliRjluWlc1bFgybGtKeXduWjJWdVpWOWlhVzkwZVhCbEp5d25aWGgwWlhKdVlXeGZaMlZ1WlY5dVlXMWxKeXdnSjJWdWRISmxlbWRsYm1WZmFXUW5MQ2RqYUhKdmJXOXpiMjFsWDI1aGJXVW5MQ2R6ZEdGeWRGOXdiM05wZEdsdmJpY3NKMlZ1WkY5d2IzTnBkR2x2YmljcExDQnRZWEowSUQwZ1ozSmpiVE01S1Z4dVhHNTNjbWwwWlM1MFlXSnNaU2hoYkd4ZloyVnVaWE1zSUdacGJHVTlYRnhuY21OdE16bGZjbVZtTG5SNGRGeGNMRnh1SUNCeGRXOTBaVDFHUVV4VFJTeGNiaUFnYzJWd1BWeGNYRngwWEZ3c1hHNGdJSEp2ZHk1dVlXMWxjejFHUVV4VFJTbGNibUJnWUZ4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5gYGByXG5hbGxfZ2VuZXMgPC0gZ2V0Qk0oYXR0cmlidXRlcz1jKCdlbnNlbWJsX2dlbmVfaWQnLCdnZW5lX2Jpb3R5cGUnLCdleHRlcm5hbF9nZW5lX25hbWUnLCAnZW50cmV6Z2VuZV9pZCcsJ2Nocm9tb3NvbWVfbmFtZScsJ3N0YXJ0X3Bvc2l0aW9uJywnZW5kX3Bvc2l0aW9uJyksIG1hcnQgPSBncmNtMzkpXG5cbndyaXRlLnRhYmxlKGFsbF9nZW5lcywgZmlsZT1cXGdyY20zOV9yZWYudHh0XFwsXG4gIHF1b3RlPUZBTFNFLFxuICBzZXA9XFxcXHRcXCxcbiAgcm93Lm5hbWVzPUZBTFNFKVxuYGBgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuYWxsX2dlbmVzIDwtIGdldEJNKGF0dHJpYnV0ZXM9YygnZW5zZW1ibF9nZW5lX2lkJywnZ2VuZV9iaW90eXBlJywnZXh0ZXJuYWxfZ2VuZV9uYW1lJywgJ2VudHJlemdlbmVfaWQnLCdjaHJvbW9zb21lX25hbWUnLCdzdGFydF9wb3NpdGlvbicsJ2VuZF9wb3NpdGlvbicpLCBtYXJ0ID0gZ3JjbTM5KVxuXG53cml0ZS50YWJsZShhbGxfZ2VuZXMsIGZpbGU9XFxncmNtMzlfcmVmLnR4dFxcLFxuICBxdW90ZT1GQUxTRSxcbiAgc2VwPVxcXFx0XFwsXG4gIHJvdy5uYW1lcz1GQUxTRSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
all_genes <- getBM(attributes=c('ensembl_gene_id','gene_biotype','external_gene_name', 'entrezgene_id','chromosome_name','start_position','end_position'), mart = grcm39)

write.table(all_genes, file=\grcm39_ref.txt\,
  quote=FALSE,
  sep=\\t\,
  row.names=FALSE)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Read-in Existing Ensembl Database
This block reads in the reference as saved from file.


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVjbVZtSUR3dElHRnpMbTFoZEhKcGVDaHlaV0ZrTG5SaFlteGxLRndpWjNKamJUTTVYM0psWmk1MGVIUmNJaXh6WlhBOVhDSmNYSFJjSWl3Z2FHVmhaR1Z5UFZSU1ZVVXBLU0FsUGlWY2JpQWdkSEpwYlhkektDbGNibUJnWUNKOSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxucmVmIDwtIGFzLm1hdHJpeChyZWFkLnRhYmxlKFxcZ3JjbTM5X3JlZi50eHRcXCxzZXA9XFxcXHRcXCwgaGVhZGVyPVRSVUUpKSAlPiVcbiAgdHJpbXdzKClcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

ref <- as.matrix(read.table(\grcm39_ref.txt\,sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dWNtVm1JRHd0SUdGekxtMWhkSEpwZUNoeVpXRmtMblJoWW14bEtGeGNaM0pqYlRNNVgzSmxaaTUwZUhSY1hDeHpaWEE5WEZ4Y1hIUmNYQ3dnYUdWaFpHVnlQVlJTVlVVcEtTQWxQaVZjYmlBZ2RISnBiWGR6S0NsY2JtQmdZRnh1WUdCZ0luMD0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmBgYHJcbnJlZiA8LSBhcy5tYXRyaXgocmVhZC50YWJsZShcXGdyY20zOV9yZWYudHh0XFwsc2VwPVxcXFx0XFwsIGhlYWRlcj1UUlVFKSkgJT4lXG4gIHRyaW13cygpXG5gYGBcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxucmVmIDwtIGFzLm1hdHJpeChyZWFkLnRhYmxlKFxcZ3JjbTM5X3JlZi50eHRcXCxzZXA9XFxcXHRcXCwgaGVhZGVyPVRSVUUpKSAlPiVcbiAgdHJpbXdzKClcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
ref <- as.matrix(read.table(\grcm39_ref.txt\,sep=\\t\, header=TRUE)) %>%
  trimws()
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


#### Loop over desired conditions and write differential expression data


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZMjl0Y0dGeWFYTnZibDlzYVhOMElEd3RJR3hwYzNRb2JHbHpkQ2hjSWpSb1gxTlViVjh4TURCY0lpd2dYQ0kwYUY5VFZHMWZNRndpS1N4Y2JpQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQnNhWE4wS0Z3aU5HaGZiVzlqYTE4eE1EQmNJaXdnWENJMGFGOXRiMk5yWHpCY0lpa3NYRzRnSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ0FnYkdsemRDaGNJakkwYUY5VFZHMWZNVEF3WENJc0lGd2lNalJvWDFOVWJWOHdYQ0lwTEZ4dUlDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lHeHBjM1FvWENJeU5HaGZiVzlqYTE4eE1EQmNJaXdnWENJeU5HaGZiVzlqYTE4d1hDSXBMRnh1SUNBZ0lDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQWdJQ0FnSUd4cGMzUW9YQ0kwYUY5VFZHMWZNRndpTENCY0lqUm9YMjF2WTJ0Zk1Gd2lLU2xjYmx4dVptOXlJQ2g0SUdsdUlHTnZiWEJoY21semIyNWZiR2x6ZENrZ2UxeHVYRzRqSUZWelpTQjBhR1VnVEVaRElHRmthblZ6ZEcxbGJuUWdabTl5SUdWaFkyZ2daM0p2ZFhBdVhHNWtaSE5NUmtNZ1BDMGdiR1pqVTJoeWFXNXJLR1JrY3l3Z1kyOXVkSEpoYzNROVl5aGNJbU52Ym1ScGRHbHZibHdpTENCNFcxc3hYVjBzSUhoYld6SmRYU2tzSUhSNWNHVTlYQ0poYzJoeVhDSXBYRzVjYmlBZ0l5QlRaWFFnYkc5amRYTWdkR0ZuY3lBb1ptbHljM1FnWTI5c2RXMXVLU0JoY3lCeWIzY2dibUZ0WlhNdVhHNGdJSEpsWmsxaGRISnBlQ0E4TFNCeVpXWmJMQzB4WFZ4dUlDQnliM2R1WVcxbGN5aHlaV1pOWVhSeWFYZ3BJRHd0SUhKbFpsc3NNVjFjYmx4dUlDQWpJRU55WldGMFpTQnRZWFJ5YVhnZ1puSnZiU0J5WlhOMWJIUnpMbHh1SUNCeVpYTk5ZWFJ5YVhnZ1BDMGdZWE11YldGMGNtbDRLR1JrYzB4R1F5bGNiaUFnSXlCTlpYSm5aU0J0WVhSeWFYZ2dkMmwwYUNCeVpXWmxjbVZ1WTJVdVhHNGdJSEpsYzBaMWJHd2dQQzBnYldWeVoyVW9jbVZtVFdGMGNtbDRMSEpsYzAxaGRISnBlQ0FzWW5rOVhDSnliM2N1Ym1GdFpYTmNJaXhoYkd3dWVEMVVVbFZGS1NBbFBpVmNiaUFnSUNCaGN5NWtZWFJoTG1aeVlXMWxLQ2tnSlQ0bFhHNGdJQ0FnWkhKdmNGOXVZU2dwWEc1Y2JpQWdJeUJTWlc1aGJXVWdYQ0p5YjNjdWJtRnRaWE5jSWlCamIyeDFiVzRnZEc4Z1RHOWpkWE5jYmlBZ1kyOXNibUZ0WlhNb2NtVnpSblZzYkNsYlkyOXNibUZ0WlhNb2NtVnpSblZzYkNrOVBWd2lVbTkzTG01aGJXVnpYQ0pkSUR3dElGd2liRzlqZFhOY0lseHVYRzRnSUNNZ1UyRjJaU0F1WTNOMklIZHBkR2dnY21WemRXeDBjeTVjYmlBZ2QzSnBkR1V1WTNOMktISmxjMFoxYkd3c0lHWnBiR1U5Y0dGemRHVXdLRndpUTI5MWJuUnpMMXdpTEhoYld6RmRYU3hjSWw5MmMxOWNJaXg0VzFzeVhWMHNYQ0l1WTNOMlhDSXBMQ0J5YjNjdWJtRnRaWE05UmtGTVUwVXBYRzU5WEc1Y2JtQmdZQ0o5IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5jb21wYXJpc29uX2xpc3QgPC0gbGlzdChsaXN0KFxcNGhfU1RtXzEwMFxcLCBcXDRoX1NUbV8wXFwpLFxu -->

comparison_list <- list(list(\4h_STm_100\, \4h_STm_0\),
                   list(\4h_mock_100\, \4h_mock_0\),
                   list(\24h_STm_100\, \24h_STm_0\),
                   list(\24h_mock_100\, \24h_mock_0\),
                   list(\4h_STm_0\, \4h_mock_0\))

for (x in comparison_list) {

# Use the LFC adjustment for each group.
ddsLFC <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast=c(\condition\, x[[1]], x[[2]]), type=\ashr\)

  # Set locus tags (first column) as row names.
  refMatrix <- ref[,-1]
  rownames(refMatrix) <- ref[,1]

  # Create matrix from results.
  resMatrix <- as.matrix(ddsLFC)
  # Merge matrix with reference.
  resFull <- merge(refMatrix,resMatrix ,by=\row.names\,all.x=TRUE) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    drop_na()

  # Rename \row.names\ column to Locus
  colnames(resFull)[colnames(resFull)==\Row.names\] <- \locus\

  # Save .csv with results.
  write.csv(resFull, file=paste0(\Counts/\,x[[1]],\_vs_\,x[[2]],\.csv\), row.names=FALSE)
}




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
comparison_list <- list(list(\4h_STm_100\, \4h_STm_0\),
                   list(\4h_mock_100\, \4h_mock_0\),
                   list(\24h_STm_100\, \24h_STm_0\),
                   list(\24h_mock_100\, \24h_mock_0\),
                   list(\4h_STm_0\, \4h_mock_0\))

for (x in comparison_list) {

# Use the LFC adjustment for each group.
ddsLFC <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast=c(\condition\, x[[1]], x[[2]]), type=\ashr\)

  # Set locus tags (first column) as row names.
  refMatrix <- ref[,-1]
  rownames(refMatrix) <- ref[,1]

  # Create matrix from results.
  resMatrix <- as.matrix(ddsLFC)
  # Merge matrix with reference.
  resFull <- merge(refMatrix,resMatrix ,by=\row.names\,all.x=TRUE) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    drop_na()

  # Rename \row.names\ column to Locus
  colnames(resFull)[colnames(resFull)==\Row.names\] <- \locus\

  # Save .csv with results.
  write.csv(resFull, file=paste0(\Counts/\,x[[1]],\_vs_\,x[[2]],\.csv\), row.names=FALSE)
}

```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

### Volcano Plot with Certain Genes Labeled

#### 4h Mock 100R vs Mock 0R
Read in file and apply significance threshold
Also mark genes to be labeled on plot

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

-->

volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/4h_mock_100_vs_4h_mock_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudm9sY2Fub0RhdGEgPC0gcmVhZC5jc3YoZmlsZT1cXENvdW50cy80aF9tb2NrXzEwMF92c180aF9tb2NrXzAuY3N2XFwpXG5cbnZvbGNhbm9EYXRhIDwtIHRyYW5zZm9ybSh2b2xjYW5vRGF0YSwgc2lnbmlmID0gaWZlbHNlKGxvZzJGb2xkQ2hhbmdlPGxvZzIoMykgJiBsb2cyRm9sZENoYW5nZT4tbG9nMigzKSB8IHBhZGo+LjAwMSwgXFxGQUxTRVxcLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgaWZlbHNlKGxvZzJGb2xkQ2hhbmdlPj1sb2cyKDMpLCBcXFVQXFwsXG4gICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICBpZmVsc2UobG9nMkZvbGRDaGFuZ2U8PS1sb2cyKDMpLFxcRE9XTlxcLCBcXE5BXFwpKSkpXG52b2xjYW5vRGF0YSA8LSB0cmFuc2Zvcm0odm9sY2Fub0RhdGEsIHVwcGVyQm91bmQgPSBpZmVsc2UoLWxvZzEwKHBhZGopPj0zMDAsIFRSVUUsIEZBTFNFKSlcbnZvbGNhbm9EYXRhIDwtIHRyYW5zZm9ybSh2b2xjYW5vRGF0YSwgdXBwZXJCb3VuZFkgPSBpZmVsc2UoLWxvZzEwKHBhZGopPj0zMDAsIDFlLTMwMCwgcGFkaikpXG5cbmdlbmVMYWJlbHMgPC0gYyhcXEN0c2tcXCwgXFxBY3A1XFwsIFxcTW1wOVxcLCBcXE9zY2FyXFwsIFxcVGxyMlxcLCBcXFRscjRcXCwgXFxUbHI2XFwsIFxcTXlkODhcXCwgXFxUaXJhcFxcLCBcXFRpY2FtMVxcLCBcXFRpY2FtMlxcLCBcXFRuZlxcLCBcXElsMWJcXCwgXFxJbDZcXCwgXFxJZm5iMVxcKVxubGFiZWxEYXRhIDwtIHZvbGNhbm9EYXRhIHw+IGZpbHRlcihleHRlcm5hbF9nZW5lX25hbWUgJWluJSBnZW5lTGFiZWxzKVxuXG5sYWJlbERhdGEgPC0gdHJhbnNmb3JtKGxhYmVsRGF0YSwgdXBwZXJCb3VuZCA9IGlmZWxzZSgtbG9nMTAocGFkaik+PTMwMCwgXFxoVFJVRVxcLCBcXGhGQUxTRVxcKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/4h_mock_100_vs_4h_mock_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


Make Volcano plot

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

MDApXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-31,20), breaks=c(-30,-25,-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\Mock 0R vs 100R - 4h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\4hVolc_Mock0vsMock100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-31,20), breaks=c(-30,-25,-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\Mock 0R vs 100R - 4h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\4hVolc_Mock0vsMock100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)
```
```

-->

volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/4h_STm_100_vs_4h_STm_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))

```r
```r
volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/4h_STm_100_vs_4h_STm_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))
```
```

YFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-31,20), breaks=c(-30,-25,-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\STm 0R vs 100R - 4h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\4hVolc_STm0vsSTm100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-31,20), breaks=c(-30,-25,-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\STm 0R vs 100R - 4h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\4hVolc_STm0vsSTm100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

-->

volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/24h_mock_100_vs_24h_mock_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))

```r
```r
volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/24h_mock_100_vs_24h_mock_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))
```
```

LS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-21,20), breaks=c(-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\Mock 0R vs 100R - 24h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\24hVolc_Mock0vsMock100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-21,20), breaks=c(-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\Mock 0R vs 100R - 24h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\24hVolc_Mock0vsMock100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

#### 24h STm 100R vs STm 0R
Read in file and apply significance threshold
Also mark genes to be labeled on plot

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

-->

volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/24h_STm_100_vs_24h_STm_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))

```r
```r
volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/24h_STm_100_vs_24h_STm_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))

```
```

LCBkcGk9NjAwKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-20,40), breaks=c(-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\STm 0R vs 100R - 24h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\24hVolc_STm0vsSTm100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-20,40), breaks=c(-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\STm 0R vs 100R - 24h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\24hVolc_STm0vsSTm100_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

-->

volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/4h_STm_0_vs_4h_mock_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))

```r
```r
volcanoData <- read.csv(file=\Counts/4h_STm_0_vs_4h_mock_0.csv\)

volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, signif = ifelse(log2FoldChange<log2(3) & log2FoldChange>-log2(3) | padj>.001, \FALSE\,
                                                      ifelse(log2FoldChange>=log2(3), \UP\,
                                                            ifelse(log2FoldChange<=-log2(3),\DOWN\, \NA\))))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, TRUE, FALSE))
volcanoData <- transform(volcanoData, upperBoundY = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, 1e-300, padj))

geneLabels <- c(\Ctsk\, \Acp5\, \Mmp9\, \Oscar\, \Tlr2\, \Tlr4\, \Tlr6\, \Myd88\, \Tirap\, \Ticam1\, \Ticam2\, \Tnf\, \Il1b\, \Il6\, \Ifnb1\)
labelData <- volcanoData |> filter(external_gene_name %in% geneLabels)

labelData <- transform(labelData, upperBound = ifelse(-log10(padj)>=300, \hTRUE\, \hFALSE\))

```
```

LCBkcGk9NjAwKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->

ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-15,15), breaks=c(-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\STm 0R vs Mock 0R - 4h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\4hVolc_STm0vsMock0_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)

````

```r
ggplot(volcanoData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), color=signif, shape=upperBound)) + 
  geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
  geom_point(data=labelData, aes(x=log2FoldChange, y=-log10(upperBoundY), shape=upperBound),
             size=1, alpha=1, color=\black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=-log2(3), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.001), linetype=\dashed\, color = \black\) +
  geom_label_repel(data = labelData, aes(label=external_gene_name),
                   fill = alpha(c(\white\),0.6),
                   color=\black\,
                   size=2.5,
                   fontface=\bold\,
                   min.segment.length=.05,
                   box.padding=0.5,
                   point.padding=0.1,
                   label.size=0.3,
                   segment.size=0.3,
                   max.overlaps=60,
                   seed=29) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=\grey\, \UP\=\#dd0000\, \DOWN\=\#0066ff\)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(\FALSE\=16, \TRUE\=17, \hTRUE\=2, \hFALSE\=1)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(-15,15), breaks=c(-20,-15,-10,-5,0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0,305)) +
  labs(title=\STm 0R vs Mock 0R - 4h\,
       color=\Condition\,
       shape=\Treatment\) +
  xlab(expression(bold(\log\[2]*\(Fold Change)\))) +
  ylab(expression(bold(\-log\[10]*\(FDR)\))) +
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=11, color=\black\),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face=\bold\),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=12)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size=14, face='bold')) +
  theme(legend.position='none')
ggsave(\4hVolc_STm0vsMock0_Final.png\, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=600)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->
